probe every configured store
concurrently, each timeout-bounded

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
503 not_ready
→ traffic routed away,
container NOT killed

div.style: color: rgb(51, 51, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
/health never probes a dependency:
a database blip must not become
a pod restart storm
